title: The collaboration manifest is an initiator-owned ACT-protected Swarm feed listing all participants
content:
## Collaboration manifest structure

A new Swarm feed is created per collaboration target, owned by the initiator:

```
Topic:  ph:v2:collab:<driveId>         (drive-level)
        ph:v2:collab:<driveId>:<docId> (doc-level)
Owner:  the collaboration initiator
```

The payload is written ACT-protected, with grantees set to all participants' Bee node public keys:

```json
{
  "kind": "drive" | "document",
  "driveId": "…",
  "documentId": "…",
  "participants": [
    { "address": "0xA…", "beeNodePublicKey": "02…", "joinedAt": "…" },
    { "address": "0xB…", "beeNodePublicKey": "02…", "joinedAt": "…" }
  ],
  "createdAt": "…",
  "version": 1
}
```

A participant joining or leaving is expressed as a new manifest revision by the initiator. Today only the initiator can rewrite their manifest feed — future work may allow any participant to amend via a Merkle-log or signed-append convention.
description: The collab manifest is an initiator-owned ACT-protected Swarm feed listing participants, their Bee node pubkeys, join times, kind, and drive/doc ids.
